category_sources: Official Kirimase documentation describes it as a CLI for building full-stack Next.js apps faster.
source_facts.description says Kirimase is a CLI for building full-stack Next.js apps.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is kirimase; official docs and GitHub README use Kirimase.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official documentation site; official site links to the GitHub repository and tutorial/docs pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official kirimase.dev site links to the GitHub repository, which redirects to vercel/kirimase.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official Kirimase documentation list Next.js app building, package integration, and scaffolding features.
